project.name: dawillygene GeneLabs Tz
project.primary_goal: Present the engineer as a serious product builder and software company-style brand, showcasing products, engineering quality, business value, trust signals, and conversion pathways.

recommended_rendering_strategy.secondary: Server-side rendering for dynamic content if needed

branding.brand_positioning: Software Engineer building secure, scalable digital products for real business operations.
branding.brand_model: Personal software studio / product engineering company

design_direction.layout_preference: Structured sections with strong spacing and sharp typography
design_direction.interaction_style: Controlled motion, polished transitions, no distracting animation

pages.name: Home
pages.purpose: Act as the company-style homepage and primary conversion entry point.

pages.name: Products
pages.purpose: Display the complete portfolio of products in categorized form.

pages.name: Product Case Study
pages.purpose: Provide deep technical and business breakdowns of major products.

pages.name: Services
pages.purpose: Explain engineering capabilities and solution offerings.

pages.name: Engineering Standards
pages.purpose: Show development quality, security, testing, and delivery discipline.

pages.name: Resume
pages.purpose: Provide recruiter-friendly career summary and downloadable CV.

pages.name: Blog
pages.purpose: Support thought leadership, SEO, and ongoing technical publishing.

pages.name: Contact
pages.purpose: Provide direct conversion path for inquiries and opportunities.

pages.name: Open Source / Labs
pages.purpose: Show experiments, utilities, packages, and R&D work.

pages.name: Architecture Library / Docs
pages.purpose: Show system diagrams, patterns, and documentation artifacts.

example_structure.headline: Dawilly Gene
example_structure.subheadline: Software Engineer building secure, scalable digital products for real business operations.

executive_summary_section.purpose: Present a company-style overview of engineering focus, delivery style, and value creation.

final_cta_section.goal: Drive contact, hiring, demo requests, or collaboration.

sections.name: Featured Products
sections.description: Highest-value systems with strong presentation and direct links to case studies.

sections.name: Product Archive
sections.description: Secondary projects, utilities, older systems, or academic work with context.

sections.name: Concept Products / R&D
sections.description: Experiments, prototypes, or future-focused design work.

database_design_standards: Handling of financial or sensitive records
testing_strategy: Testing race conditions and edge cases

content_ideas: Choosing backend stacks for production software
How I structure scalable MySQL schemas
Building software for African business contexts

presentation_rules: Do not show a meaningless logo cloud only

quality_rules: Do not feature weak or messy repositories

elements: Screenshots of validated feedback where appropriate

sections.name: Product Strategy
sections.purpose: Explain how problems are analyzed and translated into solutions.

sections.name: Industries Served / Target Domains
sections.purpose: Show domain familiarity and problem-space alignment.

sections.name: Delivery Process
sections.purpose: Describe lifecycle from discovery to deployment and support.

sections.name: Security and Reliability
sections.purpose: Show protection of systems and operational resilience.

sections.name: Performance and Scale
sections.purpose: Show readiness for growth and operational efficiency.

sections.name: Documentation and Handover
sections.purpose: Show maturity in delivery and maintainability.

typography_standards.philosophy: Use macOS-native fonts as primary system, with carefully selected web fonts for headings and accent text to create a premium, accessible, professional appearance.

macos_primary.heading: SF Pro Display
macos_primary.fallback_stack: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Oxygen, Ubuntu, Cantarell, sans-serif

recommended_font_combinations.name: Premium Professional (RECOMMENDED FOR PORTFOLIOS)
recommended_font_combinations.heading_font: SF Pro Display (macOS) or Playfair Display (fallback)

secondary_fonts: Display fonts - variable font if possible
fallback_order: Local font rendering (don't wait for network)

font_mixing_rules.contrast: Combine serif + sans-serif or geometric + humanist for visual hierarchy
font_mixing_rules.size_ratio: Use 1.25x-1.5x size ratio between hierarchy levels
font_mixing_rules.letter_spacing: Decrease letter-spacing for large headings (-0.02em to -0.01em)
font_mixing_rules.color_contrast: Ensure WCAG AA minimum 4.5:1 for body text, 3:1 for large text

macos_first_approach: Load SF Pro Display/Text by default on macOS
Fall back to web fonts on other systems
implementation_guide.css_implementation: Use font-display: swap to prevent FOIT (Flash of Invisible Text)

responsive_typography.mobile: Scaled down 20-30%, optimized for touch and reading distance
responsive_typography.approach: Use CSS clamp() or media queries for smooth scaling

accessibility_requirements.contrast_ratio: 4.5:1 minimum for normal text, 3:1 for large text
accessibility_requirements.letter_spacing: No less than 0.12em in justified text
accessibility_requirements.font_weight: Avoid weights below 400 for body text

supported_modes: MDX content for articles and rich case studies

must_do: Keep writing professional and grammatically correct
must_not_do: Overload the site with distracting effects
Expose confidential code or sensitive materials

dashboard_sections.description: Manage global site configuration, branding, and metadata

subfields.description: Font for body text and paragraphs

options: Premium Professional (SF Pro Display + Inter + JetBrains Mono)
